{{Infobox technique
| name = Pyre
| introduced = The Captain
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The Pyre is a mysterious, misty flame that serves as a source of [[life]] and resurrection. It possesses the ability to bring individuals back to [[life]], such as [[Sola]], who can manifest and restore herself through its hazy light. This entity operates through a unique form of magic that is distinct from technological sources like armor suits. The Pyre was originally gifted to a character by a dying man who had been removed from stasis, intended to serve as a guide through continuous combat. It is also associated with the act of looking deeply into its light during times of struggle.}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The Pyre is a grand magical spell anchor that sustains existence through its unique form. This item produces a misty blue-white flame that resembles a flame made of mist or a mist made of flame. This mystical [[essence]] serves to bring [[Sola]] back to [[life]], providing her with the ability to restore herself using its power.}}

{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Pyre]] is a spell anchor that resembles a flame made of mist or a mist made of flame.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c18">''The Captain'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Pyre]] is a grand magic spell anchor that sustains existence.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Pyre]] is a misty flame that brings [[Sola]] back to [[life]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Sola]] can restore herself using the misty flame of her [[Pyre]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c29">''The Captain'', chapter 29</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|A [[Pyre]] is a magical item that produces a misty blue-white flame.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c44">''The Captain'', chapter 44</ref>}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Sola]] can be reborn in her [[Pyre]] after death.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c21">''The Engineer'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Sola]] hopes to be reborn at her [[Pyre]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c37">''The Engineer'', chapter 37</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
